subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Netflix is an American subscription video on-demand over-the-top streaming service.

‘Messenger’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Messenger is an American proprietary instant messaging service developed by Meta Platforms, the company that operates Facebook.

title: ‘HBO Max’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: HBO Max is an American subscription video on-demand over-the-top streaming service, a proprietary unit of Warner Bros.

title: ‘Apple Wallet’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Apple Wallet is a digital wallet developed by Apple Inc. and included with iOS and watchOS that allows users to store Wallet passes such as coupons, boarding passes, student ID cards, government ID cards, business credentials, resort passes, car keys, home keys, event tickets, public transportation passes, store cards, and – starting with iOS 8.1 – credit cards, and debit cards for use via Apple Pay.

title: ‘Bilibili’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Bilibili, nicknamed B Site, is a Chinese online video sharing website based in Shanghai where users can submit, view, and add overlaid commentary on videos.
